mapper.update: UPDATE plant SET growth_percent = 0, last_access = SYSDATE WHERE plantno = #{plantno}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM plant WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance SET total_days = total_days + 1, last_check = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
